Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Ono seems to have stepped out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}When does Class 2-F have their next lecture...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 1 -1 -1 0 0}Ohhh, I know. You brought me some cake, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not a fan of Mont Blanc, but I like all the other kinds.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15825 0 0}...Er, I didn't mean to say that. But, hey, you're here just in time![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}I forgot to explain something in my last lecture, so I was just gonna go tell the class real quick.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}If I don't do it, I'm gonna get reprimanded. It's tough being a teacher.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}If I explain it to you right now, could you pass it on to everyone else?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 1 -1 -1 0 0}It doesn't have to be a detailed explanation or anything. Oh, do you want some watermelon the next time I have some left over?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}I can practically feel that old stickler Ekoda glaring at me... Damn, guess I'll have to do it myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I might as well practice giving the lecture with you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 1 -1 -1 0 0}I-I mean, we've already established you're not going to give the lecture in my place, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I listened to Ms. Toriumi's lecture alone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Ono doesn't seem to be returning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to give up for today.[n]{f 1 1}
